title: PHENYLPIRACETAM
description: Phenylpiracetam is a potent racetam with a phenyl group that increases its stimulant properties and ability to cross the blood-brain barrier. It's banned by WADA for its performance-enhancing effects and provides significant cognitive and physical enhancement.

research.title: S-phenylpiracetam, a selective DAT inhibitor, reduces body weight gain without influencing locomotor activity
research.summary: S-phenylpiracetam significantly decreased body weight gain and fat mass in obese rodent models.

research.title: New synthesis of β-aryl-GABA drugs
research.summary: Researchers developed a novel cascade radical reaction method for synthesizing phenylpiracetam and related compounds.

research.title: Neuroprotective and anti-inflammatory activity of DAT inhibitor R-phenylpiracetam
research.summary: R-phenylpiracetam demonstrated neuroprotective and anti-inflammatory effects through dopamine transporter interaction.

research.title: Stereochemistry of phenylpiracetam and its methyl derivative: improvement of the pharmacological profile
research.summary: Review emphasizing how molecular configuration of (R)-phenylpiracetam affects biological effectiveness for cognitive enhancement.

research.title: Single Enantiomer's Urge to Crystallize in Centrosymmetric Space Groups: Solid Solutions of Phenylpiracetam
research.summary: Analysis revealed phenylpiracetam enantiomers form distinct polymorphs with different crystallographic properties.

research.title: On the formation of phenylpiracetam solid solutions: thermodynamic and structural considerations
research.summary: Study characterized two rare solid solution types with distinct miscibility properties and phase transitions.

sentiment.summary: Highly regarded for its potent cognitive and physical enhancement. Users report significant focus and energy. Tolerance develops quickly, limiting daily use.

effects.label: Fast Tolerance:
effects.description: Loses effectiveness quickly with daily use.

sideEffects.label: Overstimulation:
sideEffects.description: Can cause anxiety in sensitive individuals.

availability.label: Banned by WADA:
availability.description: Cannot be used in competitive sports.
